title: New SDK method to open links in a new tab
excerpt:
We recently added an SDK method that allows view apps to open links in a new tab! :cowboy_hat_face: 
This method is particularly useful for apps impacted by the upcoming sandboxing changes. Check out our SDK documentatio…

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We recently added an SDK method that allows view apps to open links in a new tab!

This method is particularly useful for apps impacted by the upcoming sandboxing changes. Check out our SDK documentation for more information about the method, its parameters, and a code sample
